items.title: Did Trump save eight Iranian women from execution?
items.dek: The US president says he saved eight Iranian women from execution, but Iran says otherwise.
items.body: The US president says he saved eight Iranian women from execution, but Iran says otherwise.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump and officials 'likely' targets of press dinner shooting suspect, authorities believe
items.dek: The suspect is expected to be charged with assault of a federal officer and using a firearm during a crime of violence, officials have said.
items.body: The suspect is expected to be charged with assault of a federal officer and using a firearm during a crime of violence, officials have said.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Cora firing was Breslow's call, Red Sox prez says
items.dek: The decision to fire manager Alex Cora after the team's 10-17 start to the season started with general manager Craig Breslow, Red Sox president Sam Kennedy said
items.body: The decision to fire manager Alex Cora after the team's 10-17 start to the season started with general manager Craig Breslow, Red Sox president Sam Kennedy said.
items.author: IriLine Desk
